description: Etemaad (اعتماد, 'Trust') was founded in 2002 and managed by former MP Elias Hazrati, who also co-founded [Mehdi Karroubi](/people/mehdi-karroubi)'s National Trust Party in 2005. Banned after the 2009 Green Movement, it resumed in 2011 and remains one of the few reformist papers still operating.
